creator: Ultima1252@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 181534
guacamole-server.diff

This is an update to guacamole-server to the most current version, 0.9.12. This version has ffmpeg has been fixed to support compatibility with older ffmpeg, and no longer uses deprecated funcions in newer versions, so the Werror no longer needs to be removed.

* Updated to 0.9.12

 - Thumbnails as tab icons
 - HTTP header authentication
 - performance improvements
 - fixes for printing, file transfer, and terminal emulation

portlint -AC:
WARN: Makefile: Consider adding support for a NLS knob to conditionally disable gettext support.
WARN: Makefile: for new port, make $FreeBSD$ tag in comment section empty, to make SVN happy.
0 fatal errors and 2 warnings found.
